channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Uppsalchemy
item.description: A multi-tier alchemy system that uses A Culinary Artillery bottles.

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: Only Flower Seeds
item.description: Cultivate vanilla flowers by extracting seeds from them.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: MrLee's TV Mod
item.description: Watch videos together, in-world

item.title: Dame Elswyth’s Summons
item.description: Find and summon lost pets

item.title: VSCN Language Pack Updater
item.description: 汉化模组的更新器 VSCN Language Pack Updater

item.title: Rust Girls - Player Model
item.description: BE the waifu!

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Hardtack Bread
item.description: Dry, salty, very long-lasting bread. Needs to be softened to eat. Includes two historical dishes.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: Gear Pouch Coin Fork
item.description: Allows coinage coins to go into Knife Sheath with Pouch for Gears

item.title: Powder Manufacturing Forked
item.description: Fork of RosstheGreat's Powder Manufacturing for 1.22.3

item.title: Temporal Relics
item.description: Adds randomized affixes to found equipment, introducing mundane, corrupted, and temporally enhanced

item.title: Seamarks -- Beacons & Lighthouses
item.description: Build lighthouses and fire beacons to help navigate the world and its oceans.

item.title: Thievery Keyring
item.description: Provides a simple, craftable keyring for people to store thievery keys more easily

item.title: Laboror's Multi-Tools - Expanded Metals Compatibility
item.description: Adds metal variants to Laboror's Tools.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Craftable Locusts
item.description: Woe, locust upon ye clockmaker.

item.title: Combat Overhaul Armor Tweak
item.description: full configuration for all armor penalty debuffs allowing from -100% to +100%

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Sirenia
item.description: A collection of manatee and dugong from the Holocene.

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Machairodontinae
item.description: A collection of saber cats from human history.

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Caninae
item.description: A collection of dogs from the Holocene.

item.title: Firearms Patch
item.description: Changes the musket to deal equivalent damage to the Windlass with steel bolts.

item.title: Quartermaster
item.description: Craft a Quartermaster's Desk that acts as a remote terminal for every container around it.

item.title: Roleplay Character Creator
item.description: Classic choose-your-own-adventure style character creator for Vintage Story. Server authored!

item.title: Tillerworks
item.description: Drivable tractors and towable farming trailers with installable engines, wheels, and homemade fuel.
